title: Rustsinger
pitch: Every strike rusts your blade — scrape the rust off as currency, or let it hit 100% and shatter into a new weapon forged from whatever you bled it on.
howto: Dash-strike waves of foes; each hit rusts your blade, making it hit harder but swing slower. Hold SCRAPE to harvest rust into flakes for permanent smith upgrades and trinkets, or ride to 100% rust and shatter-reroll into one of 12 discoverable blades seeded by what and how fast you hit.
controls: Tap to dash-strike. Hold and drag to walk. Hold the SCRAPE button to harvest rust. (Desktop: WASD walk, Space scrape.)
